name: California Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 Ounces ripe olives, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, brown the ground beef and drain.
2. In a medium bowl, combine milk, 1 cup cornmeal, and beaten eggs; blend well.
3. Add the ground beef and remaining ingredients (except cheese and 2 tablespoons cornmeal) to the bowl; stir until mixed.
4. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 12x8-inch baking dish.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for 35-40 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with cheese and 2 tablespoons cornmeal.
7. Continue baking until the cheese melts. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
